validation: All six Blender/browser cases have exact vertex and face counts and rounded local bounds, covering pixel size, line thickness, flattening, the flat branch, and extrusion height. The browser preserves the exact col=[0.95777094,1,0], rough=0.36931819, and metal=0 fields and flat faces through gn.bdsf. Controlled local-space captures measure 0.9957 silhouette IoU and 0.9023 macro luminance correlation; the remaining RGB residual is the Eevee/Three.js physical-lighting difference.
